description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Passenger CI tests that runs on push to stable-* and feature/* branches and on pull requests to those branches. The workflow has five jobs: cxx for C++ unit tests on macos-latest and ubuntu-latest, integration for integration tests on macos-latest and ubuntu-latest, language for unit tests on macos-latest and ubuntu-latest for Node.js and Ruby, homebrew_packaging for Homebrew packaging unit tests on macos-latest, and source_packaging for source packaging unit tests on ubuntu-latest. Each job checks out the repository, sets up the host, runs tests with or without Docker, and uploads test logs as artifacts.
